hooks.command:
d="$PWD"; PYBIN=""
while [ "$d" != "/" ]; do
  if [ -x "$d/.venv/bin/python" ]; then PYBIN="$d/.venv/bin/python"; break; fi
  d="$(dirname "$d")"
done
[ -z "$PYBIN" ] && PYBIN="$(command -v python3 2>/dev/null)"
{ [ -n "$PYBIN" ] && [ -d tests ]; } || exit 0
"$PYBIN" -c 'import pytest' 2>/dev/null || exit 0
out=$("$PYBIN" -m pytest tests/ -q 2>&1); code=$?
[ "$code" -eq 0 ] && exit 0
PYTEST_OUT="$out" PYTEST_CODE="$code" "$PYBIN" -c 'import os,json;o=os.environ["PYTEST_OUT"][-1500:];c=os.environ["PYTEST_CODE"];print(json.dumps({"decision":"block","reason":f"Tests are failing (pytest exit {c}). Fix before finishing:\n{o}"}))'
